properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The sweetest moment of all moments All the time in all my days Nothing beats the thing I relish When I praise Your name

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In my mind the great remembrance In my heart the purest love In my tongue the best word spoken Is Your name above

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In all of my mornings In all of my evenings And in everything First and foremost Lord I give you praise

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Praise Your name, Jesus Lord I give You all my highest praise Praise Your name, Jesus You deserve the honor, the glory And my highest praise

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The sweetest moment of all moments All the time I long to spend Knowing that I’m in Your presence I praise Your name

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I think about Your love and goodness Your Word and grace in me abounds Overwhelmed with deepest thank Yous I’d sing out loud
